headline: Woman Accidentally Emails 'This Meeting Could Have Been An Email' To The Whole Company
summary: The CEO replied 'agreed' and canceled all meetings for the week. She is now a legend.
fullBody: Megan McLegend meant to text her coworker during a meeting. She emailed the entire company: 'This meeting could have been an email.' The CEO replied: 'Agreed. Meetings canceled for the week.' Her team erupted in applause. Megan has been nominated for 'Employee of the Year.' The meeting she was in continued for 3 more hours. She has no regrets.
